distinctive_elements: Data East jingle (removed in European version)
Rock-splitting clinks and clanks (criticized in reviews)

notes: Sources mention a hidden sound test accessible via controller inputs on title screen (D-Pad to change index values, A/B/X/Y buttons for songs/SFX, Select to exit). Text string 'SOUND TEST' found in ROM but doesn't appear on-screen. No detailed tempo, key, chord progression, or per-area track data documented in available sources. GamePro review described music as 'rock-splitting clinks and clanks' but provided no technical analysis. Sega Genesis version praised for 'bouncy sounds' without specification.
